commit.subject: LU-0000 testonly: dump sanity test 398k/l log
commit.message:
LU-0000 testonly: dump sanity test 398k/l log

For test only.
Catch log for dedug 398k/l failed on arm.

Change-Id: Id98d8fb9d34c7ca3a9ac71154581d1f9293008aa
Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity env=ONLY=398k+398l,MAXFREE=60000000
Test-Parameters: clientarch=aarch64 clientdistro=el8.7 \
		    testlist=sanity env=ONLY=398k+398l,MAXFREE=60000000
Signed-off-by: Xinliang Liu <xinliang.liu@linaro.org>
